name: Asana
description: Manage tasks and projects across your team. List work items, track progress, create tasks, and update statuses — all from your AI assistant.

auth.hint: Create a Personal Access Token in Profile Settings → Apps → Manage Developer Apps.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects in your Asana workspace with their names, status, and due dates.

params.name: workspace
params.description: Workspace GID to list projects from

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get full details for a specific project: description, status, due date, and team.

params.name: project_gid
params.description: Project GID from the Asana URL

params.name: opt_fields
params.description: Extra fields to include, e.g. name,notes,due_date,team,members

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a project with assignee, due date, and completion status.

params.name: project
params.description: Project GID to list tasks from

params.name: completed_since
params.description: Use "now" to return only incomplete tasks, or an ISO date for tasks completed after that date

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in Asana and assign it to a project or person.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task: rename it, change its due date, assignee, or mark it complete.

params.name: task_gid
params.description: Task GID from list_tasks or the Asana URL
